description: PR6 — rooming-repair telemetry. Refined at commit 6 to mirror pr5_rooming_repair. Stub at commit 1.
notes: rooming_repair.iterations = number of placements reassigned by the repair pass (PR6 DoR).
Commit 6 refines to a scenario where the second-pass rooming repair actually reassigns (copy from pr5_rooming_repair).
